sys_ui_action.comments:
Create a subtask for all members of the OU selected in the Primary Assignee field
2.5 P3 - removed "Show insert" this should not be shown on insert.
sys_ui_action.hint: Create a subtask for each member of the Primaree Assignee OU
sys_ui_action.name: Create Subtasks for each OU Member
sys_ui_action.sys_name: Create Subtasks for each OU Member
